chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Application No.S-70 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case. 15-01-2024 Mr. Khan Muhammad Sangi, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for respondent No.1. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, APG for the State. ***** Learned counsel for applicant, under instructions, does not press the Crl. Transfer Application and seeks directions to the trial Court to conclude the trial within a reasonable period, which has not been objected by other side. Accordingly, the Crl. Transfer Application is dismissed as not pressed. However, trial Court is directed to conclude the case within a period of two months and submit compliance report to this Court through its Additional Registrar. JUDGE Ahmad
